question: Which adapter recipe is best: keeps the source-discipline primary gains while retaining general capability?
primaryMetric: count + magnitude of CI-clean improving pre-registered metrics (adapter(prompt)-base(prompt))

retention.use: GO/NO-GO ONLY — N=70 cannot resolve a 5pt effect, so never rank on it

stoppingRule: anytime-valid confidence sequence (tools/eval_stats.confidence_sequence_mean / confidence_sequence_from_summary) — REQUIRED by claim_gate for any peekedMetrics (fixed-n CI is invalid under optional stopping)
decontam: exact/normalized-prompt now ENFORCED independently over committed packs PLUS a content-shingle (Jaccard) near-duplicate scan (tools/assert_decontam.py); private held-out split remains the open upgrade
ranking: guardrails first, then primary strength; retention is a gate not a score
honestLimits: single seed per recipe except M3-SFT (3-seed)
retention probe underpowered for a 5pt threshold (needs ~785-1570 paired items); treat as coarse guardrail
deterministic markers partly reward trained FORMAT — judge is the semantic cross-check

enforcement.claim_gate: tools/claim_gate.py — power, uncertainty, anytime-valid(peeked), construct-FAMILY distinctness, decontam, magnitude; --assert-prereg checks spec predates result via git
enforcement.lint_claims: tools/lint_claims.py — registry measurement+transfer receipts, recipe superiority receipt, no-overclaim copy
enforcement.training_rows: tools/lint_training_rows.py — discipline targets teach a HABIT, not a bare fact
enforcement.decontam: tools/assert_decontam.py — independent exact + content-shingle train/eval disjointness
enforcement.recipe: tools/benchmark_recipes.py --emit-receipt — ranking only on a powered axis with the simple baseline included
